notes: Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients that are used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations, making them indispensable in premium skincare and color cosmetics.

Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care that spans virtually every category. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients used in premium skincare, color cosmetics, and hair care worldwide. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly prized for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve formulation spreadability. As demand for silicone alternatives grows, Dow is also investing in hybrid and organic alternatives that deliver comparable sensory benefits with improved sustainability credentials.
